name: Sign On (via boldpac.com)
subject: END gun violence → need your signature
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
---
_Columbine. Virginia Tech. Fort Hood. Tucson. Newtown. Aurora. San Bernardino._

**It 's time to face facts: America has a gun problem.**

That's why we're joining progressive organizations and elected officials across the country to call on Congress to declare June as **_National Gun Violence Awareness Month_**.

**SIGN THE PETITION:[Make June _National Gun Violence Awareness Month_ >>](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea75a/e60883a/70340066/144239c5/829024687/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Awareness-Month?signature\[first_name\]=&signature\[last_name\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zip_code\]=18326")**

The facts speak for themselves:
* On average, guns kill close to **90 people** every day in the United States
* Guns are the **second-leading cause of death** for children under 20
* The **NRA 's grip over Congress** is so extreme that the government is forbidden from _even studying_ the national problem of gun violence

This initiative will launch a much-needed national conversation by promoting awareness of this issue.

It will also provide a platform for addressing the effects of gun violence, by bringing citizens and community leaders together to make our communities safer.

**[We must take action immediately to combat this worsening epidemic. Sign our petition today:](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea75a/e60883a/70340066/144239c5/829024687/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Awareness-Month?signature\[first_name\]=&signature\[last_name\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zip_code\]=18326")**

[**http://go.boldpac.com/Awareness-Month**](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea75a/e60883a/70340066/144239c5/829024687/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZtYVhKemRHNWhiV1VsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVnNZWE4wYm1GdFpTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0=/ "http://go.boldpac.com/Awareness-Month?signature\[first_name\]=&signature\[last_name\]=&signature\[email\]=dpwillis67@gmail.com&signature\[zip_code\]=18326")

Thanks for standing strong,

_BOLD PAC_

| |

220 I St. NE, Suite 280
Washington, DC 20002

| PAID FOR BY **BOLDPAC** AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE.
---

This message was sent to: **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea75a/e60883a/70340066/144239ca/829024687/VEsC/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information")** | Change or update your email address by [clicking here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea75a/e60883a/70340066/144239ca/829024687/VEsD/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/update-your-information").

CHC Bold PAC is the voice for Latinos in American politics. We are committed to representing the values of the Latino community and increasing the diversity of our leadership in the House and Senate.

Emails are a crucial way to stay in touch with our top supporters. If we're going to elect candidates passionate about issues that impact the Latino community, we need you with us every step of the way.

If you'd still like to unsubscribe from our emails, [click here](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea75a/e60883a/70340066/144239cb/829024687/VEsA/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com"). If you'd like to receive fewer emails, you can [click here.](http://go.boldpac.com/page/m/b7ea75a/e60883a/70340066/144239cb/829024687/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSJ9/ "http://go.boldpac.com/page/s/less-emails?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com") If you'd like to donate to help fund our efforts to elect diverse Democrats, please [click here](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=").

_From the entire BOLD PAC team, thanks for your support!_

**[DONATE>>](http://go.boldpac. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/boldpacq32015?refcode=footer&recurring=auto&amount=25&amounts=15,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Cresco&state=PA&zip=18326&phone=&occupation=&employer=")**

name: Rand Paul
subject: Are they crazy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot
The latest omnibus bill is a disaster.
First of all, it includes a provision that
gives the government new, unheard of authority over the Internet.

Second, there is no cutback to the funding
for sanctuary cities.
And maybe worse? Ryan's omnibus contains a
section titled "Refugee and Entrant Assistance," which funds the
President's resettlement of illegal immigrant border crossers.
I just have to wonder, are they crazy?
This is exactly the opposite of what
Americans had in mind when they elected a Republican Senate.
Will you contribute $25, $50, or $100 to
stand with me in favor of fiscal sanity?

DONATE TODAY!

I know I sound like a broken record but
Washington still doesn't get it.
We're nearing the point of no return on the
debt.
Our country is plagued by almost $19 Trillion
in debt and with this new bill, we're just accelerating the
disease.
This kind of spending is outrageous. It's
unreasonable. And it's making this country less safe.
We were elected to stand for the Constitution
-- but how can we stand for it if our country collapses under its
enormous debt?
We need to rein in this spending and I am the
only one willing to stand up to the establishment, Republicans
and Democrats, to get this country's spending under control.
Will you stand with me today?

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

Pitch in $25 TODAY >>

Pitch in $50 TODAY >>

Pitch in $75 TODAY >>

Pitch in $100 TODAY>>

Or donate another
amount >>

Paid for by Rand Paul for President

name: Rand Paul
subject: Guess what they snuck in
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Dear Patriot: In any 2,000 "omnibus spending bill," there's sure to be something for just about every Big Government apologist. This morning, as the U.S. Senate prepares to take up the House-passed budget "deal" with the White House, it's not just President Obama, Planned Parenthood and the open borders crowd who are jumping for joy. Tucked deep inside the bill's pages are new "CISA" so-called "cybersecurity" provisions to dramatically expand government spying power on American citizens. [Patriot, if you stand with me in opposing this radical scheme, please stand with me by making your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32348024:WJFpFDyNI:m:1:879035888:169F0F68DAB419DEB32B9E3FF09CF70A:r) | | [Pitch in $25 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32348024:WJFpFDyNI:m:1:879035888:169F0F68DAB419DEB32B9E3FF09CF70A:r)
---
[Pitch in $50 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32348025:WJFpFDyNI:m:1:879035888:169F0F68DAB419DEB32B9E3FF09CF70A:r)
[Pitch in $75 TODAY >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32348026:WJFpFDyNI:m:1:879035888:169F0F68DAB419DEB32B9E3FF09CF70A:r)
[Pitch in $100 TODAY>>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32348027:WJFpFDyNI:m:1:879035888:169F0F68DAB419DEB32B9E3FF09CF70A:r)
[Or donate another amount >>](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32348028:WJFpFDyNI:m:1:879035888:169F0F68DAB419DEB32B9E3FF09CF70A:r)
While this legislation is being sold as a way to increase cybersecurity in an age of hackers and security breaches, the truth is, "CISA" is little more than a thinly-veiled surveillance bill.
Under "CISA," the NSA, FBI and other federal agencies are set to get their hands on a treasure trove of new data on American citizens through portals giving them direct access to companies' most sensitive data on users.
So gone will be provisions that protect tech companies' user information from being shared directly with government. Gone would be any provisions preventing personally-identifying information to be removed before being shared. It would also remove restrictions on how government can use the data it collects!
**And it could all be done without a warrant.**
Even the Department of Homeland Security (DHS) warned last July that the data flood "CISA" would swamp them with would be of "dubious value" even while it "sweep[s] away privacy protections."
**Patriot, if DHS admits it would be an enormous attack on privacy, you know it has to be bad.**
Sadly, even as Big Government members of BOTH parties seek to stamp out the last vestiges of privacy under our Constitution's Fourth Amendment, we are no safer for it.
While our federal government was busy spying on all of us, they missed the Boston Bombers, and the San Bernardino killers.
Both should have set off red flags if our government was more interested in traditional and targeted investigative work, as opposed to the creation of a domestic spy state.
Even spy-state apologists admit the NSA's rogue spying powers haven't stopped even one terrorist attack.
Yet, we're going to hand them even more access to Americans' personal information? Massive amounts of data that, under the law, could be used for virtually anything by our federal government?
**It doesn't work. It doesn't make us safer.**
Instead, it only increases the danger to all American citizens, by distracting our government from the true threats.
Not only that, but it's highly likely to be abused as well. You and I both know it.
Why not try a new direction -- like securing our borders, seriously vetting those we allow into our country and focusing on likely threats while protecting innocent Americans' privacy?
Patriot, I'm going to fight this scheme with everything I have.
[But I'm counting on you to please stand with me.](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32348024:WJFpFDyNI:m:1:879035888:169F0F68DAB419DEB32B9E3FF09CF70A:r)
[Please make your most generous contribution of $50, $25 or even $10 right away](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32348024:WJFpFDyNI:m:1:879035888:169F0F68DAB419DEB32B9E3FF09CF70A:r).
In Liberty,
Rand Paul
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/32348024:WJFpFDyNI:m:1:879035888:169F0F68DAB419DEB32B9E3FF09CF70A:r)
---

name: Ben Carson
subject: This is for you:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32350619:sHQQ5DyHN:m:1:876315805:322B1F187E2C89A2EB577FA0BE935FA5:r)
---

Peter,

My wife Candy is a concert violinist, pianist, and singer. To celebrate the holiday season, she gathered with a few dear friends to record some beloved Christmas carols, and we'd like to share their new album, "A Very Candy Christmas," with you today.

The album features tracks with special guests Ricky Skaggs, Tony Orlando, Jason Crabb, and many more. [**To receive your copy, please make a donation of $10 or more now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32350619:sHQQ5DyHN:m:1:876315805:322B1F187E2C89A2EB577FA0BE935FA5:r)

**Your donation today will help us****fund our critical get-out-the-vote efforts in early-voting states like Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.**
Thanks for everything, and I hope you enjoy Candy's wonderful Christmas album.

-Ben
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/32350619:sHQQ5DyHN:m:1:876315805:322B1F187E2C89A2EB577FA0BE935FA5:r)

name: Team Marco
subject: grossly misleading
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
| | | | | | | | [](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45448370:JrYnCRLNT:m:1:1349778030:F85EC4390A68CBECD7FF386B7FCC234B:r)
---
| | | | Peter, If you turn on your TV these days, you will most likely hear the Democrats spewing lies about Marco. But Peter, let's try to look on the upside: The Democrats wouldn't be spreading these lies and tarnishing Marco's name if they weren't terrified of him. They know he's the best candidate to defeat Hillary Clinton and they have now enlisted every surrogate they can find to spew their anti-Rubio propaganda. Recently, Congresswoman Debbie Wasserman Schultz -- the national chairwoman of the Democratic party -- went on television and said lies so disgusting we won't even repeat them here. **In fact, what she said was so false it received a "Pants on Fire" rating from the ever liberal-leaning publisher Politifact.** **Peter, this is just the beginning. The attacks and lies are only going to increase and get worse, and we need your help to fight back.** [**Your donation of $25 or more will ensure Marco has the funds necessary to fight back and WIN.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45448371:JrYnCRLNT:m:1:1349778030:F85EC4390A68CBECD7FF386B7FCC234B:r) The Democrats are hoping that their party hears these 30 second soundbites of their lies and believes them. We're going to work day and night to ensure Marco's conservative message gets to every American in every corner of our great nation, but we won't be able to do so unless we have your support. The only time these attacks will disappear is when Hillary Clinton is defeated. Marco needs your help to ensure that happens. [**Please follow this link to make an instant online contribution to my campaign right now.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45448371:JrYnCRLNT:m:1:1349778030:F85EC4390A68CBECD7FF386B7FCC234B:r) Thank you for standing up for Marco and the truth. Team Marco P.S. The Democrats are so scared of Marco that they have now resorted to downright lying about him. I need your immediate help to fight back. It's going to take a large investment to take on the Clinton machine, and Marco won't be able to do it unless he has your support. [**Can we can count on you to stand with Marco and show your support right now by following this link?**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/45448371:JrYnCRLNT:m:1:1349778030:F85EC4390A68CBECD7FF386B7FCC234B:r)
---

---

The only time these attacks will disappear is when Hillary Clinton is defeated. Marco needs your help to ensure that happens. Thank you for standing up for Marco and the truth. Team Marco P.S. The Democrats are so scared of Marco that they have now resorted to downright lying about him. I need your immediate help to fight back. It's going to take a large investment to take on the Clinton machine, and Marco won't be able to do it unless he has your support. | | | | | | Paid for by Marco Rubio for President This message was intended for: mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com Too many emails? Click to receive updates less often. PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Rand Paul
subject: We're going to Audit the Fed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rand Paul for President
body:
Patriot-
I have great news.
I've just been told that when the Senate
returns on January 12th, we will vote on Auditing the Fed.

I've been fighting for 5 years to get this
vote.
This is a huge victory for us.
But it's still an uphill battle from here to
get full transparency from the Fed.
Let's gear up and let's really fight to make
this important change.
Stand with me, call your Senators, and donate
today.

In Liberty,
Rand Paul

amount >>

name: Team Murphy
subject: ALERT: Republicans will win
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida
body:
| **" St. Leo Poll: Undecided leads Senate race; Jolly, Murphy follow"**
\-- _Orlando Sentinel_ , 12/9/2015 Friends,

According to recent polling data, nearly **46% of Democrats surveyed said they didn 't know who they would support in the Democratic primary election for Senate in Florida.**

We have less than a year to change those people's minds from "don't know" to "I'm with Patrick!" We have to knock on thousands of doors, make thousands of phone calls, and equip and train volunteers to pound the pavement. **If we don 't, Republicans will win. It's as simple as that.**

This is going to take serious resources. And by resources, we mean money from generous individuals like you, friend.

[**We cannot miss a single goal -- including this all-important $55,000 FEC goal. The deadline is coming up quick. Click and make a contribution of $5 or more.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae218f/738133e4/3bf69acb/7f8368a2/3857546148/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151218?refcode=pme151218_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

This race is bigger than just Florida. **Not only is it a chance to turn the Sunshine State blue, it 's a chance to reclaim the Senate for Democrats.** So far, Democratic Senate candidates are tied or slightly ahead in other key battleground states -- like Wisconsin, Ohio, and Colorado.

Bloomberg News said it best: **" The War for the Senate Will Be Decided in Florida."** This race could decide if the country has to endure another two years of a disastrous Republican-controlled Senate.

Or we can hit our goals, reach the 46% undecided, help Patrick win this race, and help Democrats take back the Senate.

[**It 's up to you, friend. We only have 13 days left until the final FEC deadline of 2015. Chip in what you can.**](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae218f/738133e4/3bf69acb/7f8368a2/3857546148/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/pme151218?refcode=pme151218_m&recurring=true&amount=25.00")

Thank you,

Team Murphy | | | | | Paid for by Friends of Patrick Murphy | 4521 PGA Blvd #412, Palm Beach Gardens, FL 33418 | [http://murphyforflorida.com](http://fl.murphyforflorida.com/page/m/10ae218f/738133e4/3bf69acb/7f8368a3/3857546148/VEsF/ "http://murphyforflorida.com/")

Contributions or gifts to Friends of Patrick Murphy are not tax deductible.

name: Chris Van Hollen
subject: The toll of gun violence
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
| Friend,

The scourge of gun violence continues to plague our country, and it's time we come together to say ENOUGH!

This year alone, there have been hundreds of mass shootings, each time sparking outrage at the inaction of Congress to address this serious problem. Our communities also suffer from daily gun violence. The toll is simply too high, and we can't continue down this path.

**[Join me, and Democrats nationwide, to demand Congress take action on gun safety reforms. Sign our petition today, and make your voice heard.](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c39/70cdc2ba/47bc91b7/3964bfe/3256238750/VEsH/ "http://go.democrataction.com/page/s/tell-congress-pass-common-sense-gun-safety-reforms-now-?source=CVH&utm_campaign=CVH&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Join+me+and+Democrats+nationwide+to+dema")**

In June, I joined with my colleagues in the House and Senate to introduce the Handgun Purchaser Licensing Act of 2015.

This bill would reduce gun violence by helping states implement licensing programs for the purchase of handguns. Just like requiring a license to drive a car, one should be required to purchase a handgun.

But this commonsense measure has been stalled in Congress, along with dozens of other bills aimed at reducing gun violence, all because Republicans continue to kowtow to the NRA.

In order for things to change, Congress must act. That's why I need you today to stand with me, and Democrats nationwide, and demand that Congress pass gun safety reforms now.

**[Please sign our petition today and demand that Congress take action to reduce gun violence!](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c39/70cdc2ba/47bc91b7/3964bff/3256238750/VEsE/ "http://go.democrataction.com/page/s/tell-congress-pass-common-sense-gun-safety-reforms-now-?source=CVH&utm_campaign=CVH&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-+Please+sign+our+petition+today+and+deman")**

Thank you,

Chris

---

Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
---
We believe that emails are a vital way to stay in direct contact with supporters. You're receiving this email at dpwillis67@gmail.com. [**Click here**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91c39/70cdc2ba/47bc91b7/3964bfc/3256238750/VEsF/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/unsubscribe?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=3+-+Click+here&utm_campaign=em12182015&source=em12182015") if you'd like to unsubscribe from these messages. Please enter dpwillis67@gmail.com to ensure that we are able to unsubscribe you from our list.

name: Jeff Weaver, Bernie 2016
subject: Urgent: DNC tipping the scales for Hillary Clinton
body:
#
Brothers and Sisters -
Here's the truth: from the first day of this campaign, our success has shocked many of the Democratic Party Establishment who would have preferred a coronation over a competitive campaign.
And the reality is that the huge turnouts that we've had at our meetings, our strong fundraising, our volunteer base, and quick rise in the polls have caused the Democratic National Committee to place its thumb on the scales in support of Hillary Clinton's campaign. You see that fact evidenced in their decision to bury he Democratic debates on weekends during nationally televised football games. It's more or less an open secret.
This week, due to a fault in their own technology platforms, the DNC took unprecedented steps to take away our access to data accumulated through tens of thousands of voter contacts made by our volunteers -- supporters like you who power our political revolution. In essence, the Democratic Establishment is effectively shutting down our ability to access the information we need for field campaigns and volunteer activities just six weeks before the Iowa Caucuses. And they haven't told us when they will turn it back on.
In other words, the leadership of the Democratic National Committee is attempting to undermine our insurgent campaign. This is not acceptable. We can and must respond.
**[Sign our petition telling the Democratic National Committee -- in no uncertain terms -- that you expect a level playing field in this primary campaign. This is important.](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29ff/43f17890/4a70ab33/62111038/3691610174/VEsH/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/level-playing-field?source=em151218-level-the-field")**
That the Democratic Party would deny our staff and volunteers access to data needed to contact voters in Iowa and New Hampshire on the day we reached two million individual contributions and received two of our most prominent endorsements is disconcerting.
We hope they'll do the right thing for us, and for our supporters, quickly. But so far they haven't listened to our campaign. But I am hopeful they'll listen to you.
**Send a powerful message to the DNC by adding your name to our petition today:**
**[https://go.berniesanders.com/level-the-field](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29ff/43f17890/4a70ab33/62111038/3691610174/VEsE/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/level-playing-field?source=em151218-level-the-field")**
We'll be in touch soon as this situation evolves. You are the power behind this campaign. We are doing something unprecedented, and that has a lot of people scared.
In solidarity,
Jeff Weaver
Campaign Manager
Bernie 2016
[](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29ff/43f17890/4a70ab33/62111039/3691610174/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/level-the-playing-field?refcode=em151218")

Paid for by Bernie 2016
PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you need to update or change your information or email address, click here to [update your info](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29ff/43f17890/4a70ab33/62111026/3691610174/VEsC/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/change-your-information?source=email_footer"). Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29ff/43f17890/4a70ab33/62111027/3691610174/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjIwOTAyIn0=/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29ff/43f17890/4a70ab33/62111024/3691610174/VEsA/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/m/24fb29ff/43f17890/4a70ab33/62111025/3691610174/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
clean_body: Brothers and Sisters - Here's the truth: from the first day of this campaign, our success has shocked many of the Democratic Party Establishment who would have preferred a coronation over a competitive campaign. And the reality is that the huge turnouts that we've had at our meetings, our strong fundraising, our volunteer base, and quick rise in the polls have caused the Democratic National Committee to place its thumb on the scales in support of Hillary Clinton's campaign. You see that fact evidenced in their decision to bury he Democratic debates on weekends during nationally televised football games. It's more or less an open secret. This week, due to a fault in their own technology platforms, the DNC took unprecedented steps to take away our access to data accumulated through tens of thousands of voter contacts made by our volunteers -- supporters like you who power our political revolution. In essence, the Democratic Establishment is effectively shutting down our ability to access the information we need for field campaigns and volunteer activities just six weeks before the Iowa Caucuses. And they haven't told us when they will turn it back on. In other words, the leadership of the Democratic National Committee is attempting to undermine our insurgent campaign. This is not acceptable. We can and must respond. "" That the Democratic Party would deny our staff and volunteers access to data needed to contact voters in Iowa and New Hampshire on the day we reached two million individual contributions and received two of our most prominent endorsements is disconcerting. We hope they'll do the right thing for us, and for our supporters, quickly. But so far they haven't listened to our campaign. But I am hopeful they'll listen to you. Send a powerful message to the DNC by adding your name to our petition today: "" We'll be in touch soon as this situation evolves. You are the power behind this campaign. We are doing something unprecedented, and that has a lot of people scared. In solidarity, Jeff Weaver Campaign Manager Bernie 2016 "" Paid for by Bernie 2016 PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
